pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh script match this path
Task description Section 'Report Requirements' lists all these required items

pi_items.metadata_value: Not specified in metadata, but inferred to be 17
pi_items.source: install_openice.sh line 14 installs 'openjdk-17-jdk'; build.gradle line 2 sets JAVA_VERSION_SOURCE = 17
gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties distributionUrl references gradle-7.6-bin.zip from master branch of https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp.git

data-types/x73-idl-rti-dds/build.gradle uses RTI DDS code generation with CONNEXT_VERSION=7.3.0; folder name x73-idl-rti-dds indicates RTI DDS; GitHub mdpnp repository confirms RTI Connext is the DDS middleware
export_result.sh line 44 defines BUILD_DIR path; this matches the Gradle standard build output directory structure
export_result.sh line 11 defines OPENICE_LOG; setup_task.sh line 15 confirms this path; setup_openice.sh line 25-26 creates this directory

pi_items.verified_value: Real, publicly available data from GitHub repository https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp.git
pi_items.source: install_openice.sh line 66 clones from official mdpnp/mdpnp repository; OpenICE is a real, production medical device interoperability platform developed by MD PnP Program at Massachusetts General Hospital

privileged_info_summary: The OpenICE platform readiness certification task uses real data from the public mdpnp GitHub repository, not synthetic data. The system will use Java 17 (OpenJDK 17.0.x), Gradle 7.6, and RTI Connext 7.3.0 as the DDS middleware. Build artifacts are expected in /opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-apps/build/ directory, and logs are written to /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log. The metadata claims in task.json correctly specify the report output path and required sections.
